characters.name: Andrea
characters.description:
AndreaBackground InformationVoiced ByJamie CroninFirst AppearanceThe Right StuffCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsChantal(best friend)relativesUnknownStatusAliveAndreais a high school student who first appears in The Right Stuff along with her friend Chantal. She appears to be one of the popular girls, though her status blemished when her and Chantal's actions cause an abrupt end to Macie's pool party, much to the other's chagrin. She later appears in several episodes in the background. She is voiced by Jamie Cronin. She first appears at the beginning of The Right Stuff. As she and Chantal go insideLucky High School, Courtney tells them off. They both walk away after Courtney gives them a compliment about their shoes. The girls develop a hatred for Courtney after she greets Will. They think since Courtney is just a middle schooler, she's not on their level yet and hasn't earned any respect from them. When they’re in the bathroom, Andrea gets the idea that they should take off Courtney's bikini top at Macie's pool party. Chantal thinks Courtney stuffs her bra to look more mature. Macie overhears their conversation so the girls threaten to make her social life a living nightmare if she tells anyone. Later at the pool party, Andrea plays chicken against Courtney so Chantal can untie her bikini top. Their plan failed when Macie covered her chest with an inner tube. Will called them losers and they sarcastically comment on Courtney's inner tube. 
InFast Reputation, she can be seen with Chantal hanging out at the Wall. They both go up to Jake and talk to him. InNew Girl in Town, she can be seen leaning on the hood of Will Patterson's car. InI Spy a Witchshe‘s in the audience watching the musical.

characters.name: Andrew Starling
characters.description: Andrew StarlingBackground InformationVoiced ByLaraine NewmanFirst AppearanceButterflies Are FreeCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsLucky High SchoolMacie Lightfoot(ex-girlfriend)Courtney GriplingrelativesUnknownStatusAliveAndrew Starlingis a member of the band at Lucky High School. He first appears in part 1 of Butterflies Are Free. He is in the band group with the instructor Mr. Minor. Miranda points out to Macie that Andrew is checking her out. Macie notices and she uses her inhaler. When Courtney is believed to be missing, Andrew goes inside Lucky High to get his reeds. As Andrew searches a locker, he hears Courtney trapped inside. He opens the locker and gets a good look at her. Courtney promises to improve his social standing if he doesn't tell anyone about her incident. Andrew, however, misunderstood her words and closed the door. Courtney tells him she should've been more clear. Afterwards, Courtney is saved from the locker and she credits him for rescuing her. She changes the story of how it happened to not be embarrassed. A reporter asks if he is unnamed. He responds by telling her his name. At the graduation ceremony, he runs across the field in his band uniform. He runs into Courtney again. He asks Courtney to set him up with Macie. Courtney says consider it done and blows him a kiss.

characters.name: Archie Chang
characters.description: Archie Chang(voiced byPing Wu) isSheltered Shrubs' news reporter. He notably broadcasts aboutPrescott Griplingbeing arrested for insider trading in "The Wedding Frame."

characters.name: Art Teacher
characters.description: TheArt Teacher(voiced byChristina Pickles) appears in the episode "New Girl in Town" where she is disturbed byCarl FoutleyandHoodsey Bishop's art projects.

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenBackground InformationFirst AppearanceLosing Nana BishopCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsJonas Foutley(owner)StatusAlive Benis the pet dog ofJonas Foutley. He is an extra friendly dog according to Jonas. InHello Stranger, Ben can be heard on Jonas' voice mail as he is recording his voice. Ginger mentions Ben while she talks to Lois about her attempt to call Jonas. InLosing Nana Bishop, Ben comes up to greet Ginger in the park with Jonas by his side. As Ginger and Jonas begin to chat, Ginger walks Ben through the park. At the end of their conversation, Ben chases after a family of ducks. This causes Ginger to fall down but she gets helped up by her father. Before Ginger gets helped up, Ben comes back to give another friendly lick.

characters.name: David Charles Bishop
characters.description: David Charles BishopBackground InformationVoiced ByJohn Astin(An "Even Steven" Holiday SpecialandBlizzard Conditions)Dan Castellaneta(About Face,Lunatic Lake,Ten ChairsandLosing Nana Bishop)First AppearanceBlizzard ConditionsCharacter InformationGenderMalerelativesDodie Bishop(daughter)Hoodsey Bishop(son)Joann Bishop(wife)Nana Bishop(mother; deceased)Unnamed future granddaughterChet Zipper(future son-in-law)Macie Lightfoot(future daughter-in-law)StatusAliveDavid Charles BishopisDodieandHoodsey's father andJoann Bishop’s husband. He is a soft-spoken man who cares deeply about his children. He is the peace maker in the family. Dan Castellaneta(About Face,Lunatic Lake,Ten ChairsandLosing Nana Bishop) David met Joann sometime around 1980 inLucky Jr. High, as he is aware of the awful things that she would do in order to achieve popularity. He is always there to support his wife and kids. He had a good talk with Dodie and Hoodsey about their mother's past in jr. high.

characters.name: Dodie Bishop
characters.description: Dodie BishopBackground InformationVoiced ByAspen MillerFirst AppearanceThe PartyCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsGinger Foutley(best friend)Macie Lightfoot(best friend)Courtney Gripling(friend)Darren Patterson(best friend)Orion(friend)relativesJoann Bishop(mother)David Charles Bishop(father)Hoodsey Bishop(younger brother)Nana Bishop(grandmother; deceased)Chet Zipper(future husband)Delilah Zoe-Bishop(future daughter)Macie Lightfoot(future sister-in-law)StatusAliveDeirdre Hortense "Dodie" Bishopis an ultimate chatterbox and recycled gossip authority and has been Ginger's best friend since second grade along with Macie Lightfoot. Dodie appears in the pilot episode,The Partybut makes her official debut in thefirst episodeof series. Dodie always has the latest news on the student body at hand and is possibly the most desperate for popularity (and for that reason the least likely to get it). Still, the knowledge she has about her peers is impressive: Dodie can tell you the exact shade of lipstick each of the popular girls wear, why it does or doesn't work for them, and what each of them is best known for. Other than that, Dodie loves slumber parties and has been known to be somewhat of a drama queen. Dodie is usually a good person and friend to Ginger and Macie. She is loyal to the two but does suffer terrible jealousy and selfishness whenever their friendship appears to be coming apart due to outside forces. During those times, she will try to keep their friendship in tact however she can, at times having to use underhanded methods.

characters.name: Joann Bishop
characters.description: Joann BishopBackground InformationVoiced BySusan KrebsFirst AppearanceStealing First(dialogue only)Sleep On It(first physical appearance)Character InformationGenderFemalerelativesDodie Bishop(daughter)Hoodsey Bishop(son)David Charles Bishop(husband)Nana Bishop(mother-in-law; deceased)Unnamed future granddaughterChet Zipper(future son-in-law)Macie Lightfoot(Future Daughter-In-Law)StatusAlive Sleep On It(first physical appearance) Joann Bishopis the mother ofDodieandHoodseyBishop and a minor character in the series. She is known for being quite intense. She has a love-hate relationship with the Foutley family, particularly Carl and Lois, she often gets into arguments with them, most of them involving Carl. She believes that Carl is a bad influence on her son Robert Joseph (Hoodsey).

characters.name: Nana Bishop
characters.description: Ernestine BishopBackground InformationFirst AppearanceLosing Nana Bishop(photograph)Character InformationGenderFemalerelativesDodie Bishop(granddaughter)Hoodsey Bishop(grandson)David Charles Bishop(son)Joann Bishop(daughter-in-law)Unnamed future great granddaughterChet Zipper(future grandson-in-law)Macie Lightfoot(future granddaughter-in-law)StatusDeceasedErnestine "Nana" Bishopwas Dave Bishop's mother, making her the mother-in-law of Joann and the paternal grandmother of Dodie and Hoodsey. She passed away in the episode "Losing Nana Bishop."  Nana Bishop seemed to be a nice woman as Dodie has many fond memories of her. Hoodsey wasn't as close to her, but he still was able to give her a nice eulogy.

characters.name: Blake Gripling
characters.description: Blake Sophia GriplingBackground InformationVoiced ByKath SoucieTara Strong(in The Party only)First AppearanceThe Party(cameo)Character InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsWinstonrelativesCourtney Gripling(sister)Claire Gripling(mother)Prescott Gripling(father)StatusAliveBlake Sophia Griplingis the younger brother ofCourtney Gripling, and the frienemy of Carl and Hoodsey. He is generally spoiled, devious, but a gentleman, and he sometimes makes considerable efforts to befriend Carl, seemingly wishing to become best friends on a few occasions. Tara Strong(in The Party only) ﻿At first, Blake was an immature child who spied on his sister and her friend,Miranda. He also seemed to want to be friends with Carl, but dislikedHoodsey, often calling him "Woodsey". He is often seen attempting to become part of Carl and Hoodsey's plans, in addition to offering his criticism. He is closest to his butlerWinston, and they seem to have a father-son relationship (unlike the relationship he has with his actual father Prescott Gripling). Blake was taught to behave properly and be obedient. Unlike his sister, he seems to be very smart, having skipped two grades.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobBackground InformationVoiced ByRobert CostanzoFirst AppearanceFast ReputationCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsLucky Elementary SchoolrelativesUnknownStatusAliveBobis a minor character who is frequently mentioned in the beginning of the series before making his physical appearance in "Fast Reputation". He is the chef for all three schools on the Lucky campus. He is commonly referred to as "Chef Bob". Bob is an overweight individual who has a lot of grease stains on his clothing. Due to being overweight, his stomach constantly sticks out of his shirt, revealing his belly button. He has blue jeans and is slightly balding.

characters.name: Brandon Higsby
characters.description: Brandon HigsbyBackground InformationVoiced ByGrey DeLisleFirst AppearanceStealing First(cameo)Character InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsMr. LicoricerelativesStuart Higsby(brother)Mr. Higsby (father)Mrs. Higsby (mother)StatusAliveBrandon Higsby(voiced byGrey DeLisle) wishes to be liked by his peers. His parents think he's popular (although he seems to be the least popular kid atLucky Elementarynot having any real friends). He is almost never seen without his pet monkeyMr. Licorice, and he wantsCarlandHoodseyto like him. He tends to get involved in a few of Carl and Hoodsey's plans, either acting as a sabotager, or as the one who does the tasks Carl and Hoodsey don't want to do. He is 9 years old, and he can be seen with his brother's (Stuart Higsby's) pet monkey. He first made a major appearance in the episode "Dare I, Darren?". He tends to be really happy and optimistic, and is slightly naive when it comes to Carl and Hoodsey. He believes most things they say (revealing how he is also rather gullible) which often ends with Brandon getting scared out of his wits. He is often talking about how smart Mr. Licorice is. He likes The Little Seal Girl, and can often be seen singing, most of the time for Carl and Hoodsey's schemes or for talent shows. He is able to play the glockenspiel as seen in "The 'A' Ticket". His parents think he's popular, due to the fact that he lied them so. He wanted Carl and Hoodsey to attend his birthday party and cried when they declined in "New Girl in Town". In the episode "Never Can Say Goodbye", Mr. Licorice goes missing and Brandon gets distressed about it. He gets Carl and Hoodsey to help get him back. In "Deja Who?", he becomes friends with Hoodsey because he got amnesia. He often enjoys hanging out with Carl and Hoodsey, and sometimes Blake. He has an older brother called Stuart, though they are almost never seen on screen together, if at all.

characters.name: Bridget Lightfoot
characters.description: Bridget LightfootBackground InformationFirst AppearanceAn Even Steven Holiday SpecialCharacter InformationGenderFemalerelativesMacie Lightfoot(niece)StatusAliveBridget Lightfootis Macie's aunt. According to Macie, she is a millionaire who discovered dietetic orange juice. Not much is known about her, as she never makes an actual appearance in the series and is only mentioned/briefly explained in "An Even Steven Holiday Special."  She bears a strong resemblance to Macie. Bridget wears blue cats eye glasses. She also has two buck teeth and wears a pink beaded necklace around her neck, a tan fur coat and red lipstick.

characters.name: Buzz Harris
characters.description: Buzz HarrisBackground InformationVoiced ByTom KennyFirst AppearanceTGIFCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsLois Foutley(ex-girlfriend)Buddy BakerrelativesJunior, Rhesus & Junior Sr. (sons)StatusAliveBuzz Harrisis the local plumber forSheltered Shrubs. He was first introduced in the episode "TGIF" where he drove Lois back to her home after her car broke down in the middle of the street. While he dropped Lois off at her house, he then inspected the house where he discovered the rareF-13 moldhad infiltrated the Foutley's residence. He was the love interest of Lois Foutley for a short period of time. He first appears in "TGIF" where he sees that Lois' car had broken down. Lois remembers that he was the plumber she called for. He offers to give Lois a ride home after she tells him she called for a tow truck. When he goes to the house bathroom, he discovers a deadly mold that has been growing in the wall. InMs. Foutley's Boys, she went out on a date with Buzz. She brings him to the house for dessert. Ginger asks him what level of work he is in. He responds by saying he is a plumber and an electrician. Lois recalls when he gave a jump to her car. Buzz introduces his sons by showing them a picture. The next day, Buzz is working on the ceiling fan in the living room. His sons run around and play a game with Carl and Hoodsey. When Ginger goes to take a shower, the water excessively come out of the shower head. Buzz tells her that he raised the water pressure. He said there was no need to thank him for the "man's touch". After her shower, Buzz, Carl and the boys surprise her and play a little game with her.

characters.name: Carl Foutley
characters.description: Carl FoutleyBackground InformationVoiced ByJeannie EliasFirst AppearanceThe PartyCharacter InformationGenderMaleAge9-10 (seasons 1 & 2)11 (season 3)AffiliationsHoodsey Bishop(best friend)Noelle SussmanBrandon Higsby(ally)Dwayne CochranBlake Gripling(rival)MauderelativesLois Foutley(mother)Jonas Foutley(father)Dr. David Dave(stepfather)Mrs. Dave(step grandmother)Grandma Foutley(grandmother; deceased)Ginger Foutley(older sister)Darren Patterson(future brother-in-law)Sophia Foutley(future niece)StatusAliveCarl FoutleyisGinger's younger brother. He‘s in the fourth grade in the first season. He and his best friend,Hoodsey, come up with their schemes and perform their experiments in an abandoned doghouse in the Foutleys' backyard. He is one of the main characters of the series and appears in practically all episodes with his own story lines. He is voiced by Jeannie Elias. 11 (season 3) Courtney Gripling's younger brother, Blake, is often the recipient of Carl's bad humor, due to the repeated theft of a petrified eyeball that initially belonged to Carl. Blake can usually be seen trying to get on Carl's good side, but Carl refuses his advances and takes every opportunity to humiliate Blake.

characters.name: Carl Foutley
characters.description: Carl FoutleyBackground InformationVoiced ByJeannie EliasFirst AppearanceThe PartyCharacter InformationGenderMaleAge9-10 (seasons 1 & 2)11 (season 3)AffiliationsHoodsey Bishop(best friend)Noelle SussmanBrandon Higsby(ally)Dwayne CochranBlake Gripling(rival)MauderelativesLois Foutley(mother)Jonas Foutley(father)Dr. David Dave(stepfather)Mrs. Dave(step grandmother)Grandma Foutley(grandmother; deceased)Ginger Foutley(older sister)Darren Patterson(future brother-in-law)Sophia Foutley(future niece)StatusAliveCarl FoutleyisGinger's younger brother. He‘s in the fourth grade in the first season. He and his best friend,Hoodsey, come up with their schemes and perform their experiments in an abandoned doghouse in the Foutleys' backyard. He is one of the main characters of the series and appears in practically all episodes with his own story lines. He is voiced by Jeannie Elias. 11 (season 3) Courtney Gripling's younger brother, Blake, is often the recipient of Carl's bad humor, due to the repeated theft of a petrified eyeball that initially belonged to Carl. Blake can usually be seen trying to get on Carl's good side, but Carl refuses his advances and takes every opportunity to humiliate Blake.

characters.name: Chantal
characters.description: ChantalBackground InformationVoiced ByKimberly BrooksFirst AppearanceThe Right StuffCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsAndrea(best friend)relativesUnknownStatusAliveChantalis a high school student who first appears in The Right Stuff along with her friend Andrea. She appears to be one of the popular girls, though her status blemished when her and Andrea's actions cause an abrupt end to Macie's pool party, much to the other's chagrin. She later appears in several episodes in the background. She is voiced by Kimberly Brooks. In The Right Stuff, Chantal makes a snide remark to Macie and Courtney by saying their pre-teen school is across the street. Courtney defends herself by saying she and Macie are going to a French class. Chantal confronts her back and says they'll see her there. She thinks Courtney is a bra stuffer so she Andrea plan to take off her bikini top at Macie's pool party. When the pool party starts, Chantal sneaks up behind Courtney and unties her bikini top off while she's playing chicken. Macie comes over just in time to cover up Courtney’s chest. InFast Reputation, she and Andrea are seen hanging out at the Wall which is a hot spot for high schoolers. Soon after, they approach Jake and talk to him for a moment. She gets along with Andrea very well. She's willing to do something underhanded to get an advantage just like her friend.

characters.name: Chet Zipper
characters.description: Chet ZipperBackground InformationVoiced ByHope LevyFirst AppearanceStealing First(cameo)Character InformationGenderMalerelativesDodie Bishop(future wife)Joann Bishop(future mother-in-law)David Charles Bishop(future father-in-law)Hoodsey Bishop(future brother-in-law)Unnamed future daughterNana Bishop(future grandmother-in-law; deceased)StatusAliveChet Zipperis a student atLucky Jr. High. He and Dodie became friends than later boyfriend and girlfriend then become husband and wife in the future. InOf Lice and Friends, Principal Milty addresses the students in the cafeteria for the new morning announcement person. He welcomes Chet to the stage for him to announce the new person. Chet begins by saying he enjoys making the morning announcements every morning and afternoon. The students quickly get bored and start yawning. He draws a name from bowl and says the new morning announcement person is Dodie Bishop. He walks off the stage with Mrs. Fleming to let Dodie have her moment. InCome Back Little Seal Girl, he comes out on stage at the auditorium. He introduces himself to the audience by saying his name and saying he's a part-time 7th grader. He claims he‘s a full time funny man. He asks how the audience is doing tonight but they don't respond. He then proceeds to tell a joke about parents. After a student named Morty Binkerton finishes playing his clarinet, he introduces the next act which is Courtney's World. After their act ends, he introduces Macie's act as the Little Seal Girl. At the end of the talent show, Chet announces the winner of the talent show is Macie.

characters.name: Claire Gripling
characters.description: Claire GriplingBackground InformationVoiced ByCandi MiloFirst AppearanceSleep On ItCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsProtected Pines Country Club(former member)WinstonrelativesPrescott Gripling(husband)Courtney Gripling(daughter)Blake Gripling(son)StatusAliveClaire Griplingis Courtney and Blake's mother. She is married to Prescott Gripling. She believes in spoiling her children. It has been revealed that she and Courtney take a trip to Paris each spring to see the new fashions too. Still, Claire has a lot to learn about being a good person. InTrouble in Gal Pal Land, Claire agrees to haveHoodseypose as a street urchin whom she took in so she could win the election to be a board member of the country club, revealing that she will lie and deceive people in order to gain power, although she did in fact keep her promise to Hoodsey andCarl. InMommie NearestClaire goes to hospital after a badfacelift. She has a good relationship with her children and she loves them very much. InButterflies Are Free, she was worried about Courtney when she went missing for a brief moment. Courtney was eventually found in a locker by Andrew. Claire also attended her graduation along with Winston. She tends to be more of a friend to her kids rather than a mother. However, Courtney and Blake are good children and love their mother very much. Her relationship status with Prescott is they are still married. It's presumed that he is a busy man and he doesn't have time to see his kids as much as he wants to. InTGIF, Claire calls Prescott so her family can talk to him. Ginger was expecting to see him in person. Claire wasn't accepted in her country club after they found out that Hoodsey wasn't really a street urchin in Trouble in Gal Pal Land. Claire is a caring mother and does her best to take care of Courtney and Blake. Although, she can carry herself professionally at times, she does what she can to be there for her kids.

characters.name: Cleetis Boregard
characters.description: Cleetis Boregard(voiced byBilly West) is a hillbilly whoCarl Foutley,Hoodsey Bishop, andBrandon Higsbywatch on TV in the episode "Next Question." Cleetis tells a reporter that a groundhog ate his arm "straight to the elbow." Brandon is horrified by this and changes the channel. Later in the episode, Hoodsey asks Carl "Do I have to remind you of Cleetis Boregard and his stumpy arm?"

characters.name: Clover
characters.description: CloverBackground InformationVoiced ByTress MacNeilleFirst AppearanceGinger's SoloCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsSasha(boyfriend)Heathered Hills Junior HighrelativesUnknownStatusAliveCloveris a minor character who appeared in the episode "Ginger's Solo." She was the ex-girlfriend ofSashawho dumped him for a rich and popular boy atHeathered Hills. Sometime during the series, both Clover and Sasha got back together.

characters.name: Coach Candace
characters.description: Coach CandaceBackground InformationVoiced ByNora DunnFirst AppearanceButterflies Are FreeCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationsLucky High School(cheerleading coach)relativesUnknownStatusAliveCoach Candaceis the cheerleading coach at Lucky High School. In part 1 in Butterflies Are Free, she watches her cheerleading squad as they perform. Dodie says that she wants in and Candace says don't they all. She then goes on to say that Dodie has to audition in front of the squad. Which includes a couple of routines. She emphatically tells Dodie that no freshman has ever made the squad before. In Kiss Today Goodbye, Dodie goes in her office while she's eating lunch. Dodie asks if her if she will consider her for the pep squad's blue and gold season alternate. Candace tells her that a girl comes up to her every year and asks the same thing. But her answer is still no freshman. Dodie agrees to make her low-carb lunches. She bought a list of her likes and dislikes fromStuart Higsby. According to the list, she hates all things soy. The next day, she brings Candace her lunch and she loved it. Dodie then answers her phone in the office.

characters.name: Coach Guardino
characters.description: Coach GuardinoBackground InformationVoiced ByDavid JeremiahFirst AppearanceButterflies Are FreeCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsLucky High SchoolrelativesUnknownStatusAliveCoach Guardinois the football coach at Lucky High School. In Butterflies Are Free, Darren and some other boys see what the football environment looks like during orientation. Guardino tells them what football contact looks like while the players practice. He tells that team practice starts at around mid-August which is a couple of weeks before the start of the school year. He also informs them that they're going to go right through Thanksgiving day. Coach tells the boys that they are looking for commitment, dedication and a willingness to undergo compound body fractures. He then recognizes Darren as a member of his family. Darren confirms his name to Guardino. He tells the other students that Darren's father was the best coach in the school's history. He says his brother Will is possibly the best high school quarterback of all time. He puts Darren in a headlock and says he guess he knows where he'll be in mid-August. Darren, however, tells him that he's not much of a football fan and he's more kind and gentle than his father and brother. Guardino dismisses Darren's remarks as a joke when he said he likes long walks in the park and intact collarbones.

characters.name: Courtney Gripling
characters.description: Courtney GriplingBackground InformationVoiced ByLiz GeorgesFirst AppearanceThe PartyCharacter InformationGenderFemaleAge12 - 14 (according to shows timeline in junior high)AffiliationsMiranda Killgallen(best friend)Ginger FoutleyMipsy MipsonWinstonHope Rogers(former rival)Andrew Starling(ally)relativesClaire Gripling(mother)Prescott Gripling(father)Blake Gripling(younger brother)LikesGinger Foutley(according to shows creator)StatusAliveCourtney Claire Gripling(voiced byLiz Georges) is a major character onAs Told By Ginger. She appears in the pilot episodeThe Party, and makes her official debut in thefirst episodeof the first season. Courtney Gripling takes her role as "The Most Popular Girl at Lucky Junior High" very seriously. Her fascination withGinger Foutleybegan as an experiment to see how the other half lives and eventually blossomed into a real friendship. Courtney looks to Ginger as someone she can turn to when she needs help or advice from someone other than her mindless followers. While her other friends Mipsy and Miranda virtually worship the ground that Courtney walks on, Ginger seems to do just fine living independently from Courtney's shadow.

characters.name: Crazy Floyd
characters.description: Floyd BoggsBackground InformationVoiced ByCharlie DellFirst AppearanceLunatic LakeCharacter InformationGenderMaleAffiliationsLoon LakeLake Side InstitutionrelativesUnknownStatusAliveCrazy Floydis a man who went psychotic and on the loose in Loon Lake. At the beginning of Lunatic Lake, Macie tells his back story. She reveals his real name is Floyd Boggs but he is usually called by his nickname Crazy Floyd. She talked about how he checked on the Lake Side Institution without his psychiatrist's permission. She says he may still be on the loose and believed to be bipolar and dangerous. Ms. Zorski tells Macie that she was supposed to find a story relevant to her own life. Macie says it is relevant because she, Ginger (plus Carl) and the Bishops are going to Loon Lake for a vacation. However, Ms. Zorski says she's reading the story from a tabloid paper. She eventually dismisses the class for their 11 days off. After Lois sends Ginger on her trip, she goes inside and watches TV. A reporter says that Floyd is being searched for after escaping from the Lake Side Institution. He is expected to be in his early 40s, extremely dangerous and emotionally unstable. Lois jokingly compares him to Joann in a straitjacket.
